items.title: Caching Strategies
items.description: Cache patterns, eviction policies, Redis deep dive, cache invalidation strategies, and common pitfalls like cache stampede and cache penetration.

items.title: CPU Scheduling
items.description: CPU scheduling algorithms, metrics, multilevel queues, real-time scheduling, and how the Linux CFS scheduler works.

items.title: Indexing & Query Optimization
items.description: Deep dive into database indexes — B-Tree, hash, covering, composite — and strategies to analyze and optimize slow queries.

items.title: JVM Internals: Memory, GC & Class Loading
items.description: Guide to JVM internals covering memory layout, garbage collection, class loading, and runtime performance basics.

items.title: Parallel Consumer in Kafka
items.description: Explains parallel consumer patterns in Kafka for increasing throughput when processing is slower than message consumption.

items.title: Performance & Monitoring
items.description: Identifying slow queries, profiling tools, key metrics, connection pooling, and practical optimization workflow.

items.title: Virtual Memory Deep Dive
items.description: Address spaces, swap, OOM killer, huge pages, NUMA, and practical Linux memory tuning.
